address: A.R.T Centre, Tan House Lane, Widnes WA8 0RR
aboutText: Home N Dry Property Maintenance is a family-run Widnes business that has looked after more than a thousand homes and businesses across Cheshire and Merseyside. Owner Tommy Smith and the team handle everything from a single slipped slate to a complete new roof, with the same honest pricing and clean workmanship on every job.
notes: No logo available. Emphasise the 'over 1,000 delighted clients' as the main trust signal. Local Widnes/Cheshire/Merseyside coverage. Tommy Smith is the owner. Multiple phone numbers exist — lead with freephone 0800 959 6529, use mobile 07831 910 677 for WhatsApp. Site has no reviews page, so generate 6 realistic reviews.
